_purpose: External intelligence source for the Galaxy-DRE Intel Archive overlay.
_deploy_note: Place this file in the same directory as your galaxy HTML file.

sections.label: START HERE
sections.title: START HERE
sections.subtitle: New to the Galaxy? This is your entry point. Everything you need to begin.
sections.what:
Galaxy-DRE is a privacy-first AI operating ecosystem built for builders, creators, founders, operators, and businesses that need to execute at a higher level without relying on fragmented software stacks or large teams.

The ecosystem combines planning, workflow architecture, development systems, debugging environments, execution infrastructure, privacy foundations, and supporting utilities into a single connected command environment.

Unlike traditional AI platforms focused only on chat or content generation, Galaxy-DRE is designed around operational flow — helping users think, design, build, repair, and execute from one unified system.

At the center of the ecosystem is the CORE execution stack:
• DRE CS Interface → operational planning and system direction
• DRE Workflow → visual execution architecture
• DRE Code → development and build environment
• NWA / Debugger → repair, testing, and optimization
• DRE Console → optional GTM execution layer when deployment or market execution is needed

Supporting systems like Andre Go, ZIP Tool, and DRE Extractor strengthen the workflow with browser security, privacy protection, and utility infrastructure, while community systems like Orbit, 24 Hours, RePrizal, Loan Shark, and DRE OS expand the ecosystem beyond the build environment itself.

The galaxy interface functions as a live operational map. Every planet represents an active system, execution layer, or support environment connected to the larger ecosystem.

Galaxy-DRE was built for people who want to operate beyond the limitations of disconnected AI tools, scattered workflows, and traditional software environments — giving individuals and small teams the ability to plan, build, execute, and scale from a single connected system.
sections.how:
Galaxy-DRE is structured as a connected operational workflow designed to move users from planning to execution through a coordinated system environment.

The primary entry point into the ecosystem is DRE CS Interface.

DRE CS Interface acts as the operational command layer — where users organize ideas, structure projects, diagnose problems, create plans, and establish direction before building anything else inside the ecosystem.

From there, projects move into DRE Workflow, where execution systems, logic structures, workflows, and project architecture are visually designed and mapped in real time.

Once the execution structure is complete, users move into DRE Code — the primary development and build environment inside the Galaxy-DRE ecosystem. DRE Code is where websites, applications, systems, and tools are actively built using the workflow structure established earlier in the process.

If issues appear during development, NWA and Debugger function as the repair and optimization layer of the ecosystem — helping users troubleshoot, resolve code problems, test systems, and stabilize builds after development.

DRE Console exists as an optional execution layer used primarily for GTM (Go-To-Market) operations, deployment workflows, execution tracking, and operational rollout. It is not intended to be the starting point of the ecosystem, but rather an execution environment used when projects are ready for operational deployment.

Supporting infrastructure systems operate alongside the core workflow:
• Andre Go → browser security, privacy foundation, and AI conversation management
• ZIP Tool → local file compression and extraction utility
• DRE Extractor → local media and audio extraction utility

Additional ecosystem systems such as Orbit, 24 Hours, Loan Shark, RePrizal, and DRE OS function as community and operator-support platforms rather than core workflow systems.

The galaxy itself acts as a cinematic command environment. Every planet inside the system represents a connected operational layer, support environment, or active ecosystem system. The Control Deck organizes systems by category, while the INTEL system provides access to the full ecosystem knowledge archive at any time.

Galaxy-DRE is intentionally structured to reduce fragmentation — allowing users to move through planning, workflow design, development, troubleshooting, and execution without constantly switching between disconnected platforms and environments.

paths.title: FIRST TIME?
paths.desc: Save Andre Go to your browser first. It sets up your privacy and device security foundation before you build anything.

paths.title: NEED GUIDANCE?
paths.desc: Open DRE CS Interface. It runs the Andre Method — a framework to drive results when working on various projects.

paths.title: BUILD A SYSTEM?
paths.desc: Plan in DRE CS Interface, then design in DRE Workflow, then build in DRE Code with the Agent Planner.

paths.title: SOMETHING BROKEN?
paths.desc: Use NWA or the Debugger to fix issues after building in DRE Code.

paths.title: PRIVACY?
paths.desc: DRE OS scans your device and gives you a real exposure score with hardening steps.

paths.title: FINANCIAL STRESS?
paths.desc: Loan Shark maps your exact payday loan survival path — reborrow sequences and exit strategies.

sections.label: CORE SYSTEMS
sections.title: CORE SYSTEMS
sections.subtitle: Every active tool in the Galaxy-DRE ecosystem. Full intelligence on purpose, position, and usage.

entries.name: Andre Go
entries.category: Privacy & Security Tool · Chrome Extension · v5.0.0
entries.purpose: Save this to your browser first. Andre Go is your home base for setting up device security and protecting your privacy across AI platforms.
entries.description: Andre Go is where you start — before you build anything. It handles privacy setup and device security, and also captures AI conversations across 10+ platforms automatically in real time. Save it to your browser and come back to it whenever you need security guidance.
entries.best_for: Anyone setting up a secure foundation before building in the ecosystem, or anyone using AI platforms daily who needs conversation history.
entries.workflow_position: Step 1 — Always. Save to browser before anything else.
entries.technical_details: Manifest V3 Chrome extension. Content scripts intercept DOM mutations on AI platform pages. All data stored in chrome.storage.local. No background server calls.
entries.api_requirements: Andre Cloud included (no key needed). Optional: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, DeepSeek, Grok via own API key.
entries.privacy_notes: 100% local. No data transmitted. No tracking. No analytics on your conversations.

entries.name: DRE CS Interface
entries.category: AI Chat Terminal · Andre Method Framework
entries.purpose: Planning, diagnosis, and direction tool. Uses a minimal version of the Andre Method — a framework to drive results when working on various projects.
entries.description: DRE CS Interface is where you go when you need guidance and steps. It is NOT the same as Chat with DRE (which is the website AI assistant for customers). This is the operator tool — bring your project here for planning, system design, and diagnosis before building. It does not scale on its own, so use it as a guide, not an executor.
entries.best_for: Operators actively building in the ecosystem who need structured planning, project diagnosis, or direction before moving to DRE Workflow.
entries.workflow_position: Step 2 — After Andre Go. Plan here before designing in DRE Workflow.
entries.technical_details: Multi-provider: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, DeepSeek, Local (LM Studio / Element), Custom endpoint. Controller modes: DRE Default, Ford Technical, Book Writing. File attachments: PDF, JSON, TXT, Markdown.
entries.api_requirements: Requires your own API key from any supported provider. No key = no chat.
entries.privacy_notes: API key stored in browser localStorage only. Never transmitted to Galaxy-DRE.

entries.name: DRE Workflow
entries.purpose: Visual workflow builder with node connections, AND/OR logic gates, AI-assisted generation, template library, and minimap navigation.
entries.description: DRE Workflow is the design layer. After planning in DRE CS Interface, you build your execution plan here visually. The Companion (Architect) tool is template-based and helps with numerous project types — games, websites, programs, etc. DRE Architect shows novice users what they're building in real time.
entries.best_for: Anyone designing execution plans before building. Use after DRE CS Interface, before DRE Code.
entries.workflow_position: Step 3 — Design your system here after planning in DRE CS Interface.
entries.technical_details: Canvas-based node editor. Supports file and template uploads. Minimap for large flow navigation. AI generation via prompt input. Companion (Architect) for template-based projects.
entries.api_requirements: None required for basic workflow building. AI generation features require a provider key.
entries.privacy_notes: All data local. Workflows stored in browser.

entries.name: Dre Code
entries.purpose: Build environment and gateway to the full DRE Galaxy suite. AI-powered editor with Novice Guard Mode, Smart Code Search, and Live Preview.
entries.description: DRE Code is your build environment. Use it with the Agent Planner for step-by-step building of websites, apps, and programs. The full DRE Galaxy suite includes: DRE Code (editor), DRE Companion/Architect (template builder, real-time visual preview for novices), NWA (fix/debug), Debugger (error resolution), and Replicated (duplication and scaling).
entries.best_for: Developers and creators building within the ecosystem after designing in DRE Workflow.
entries.workflow_position: Step 4 — Build here after designing in DRE Workflow. Use Agent Planner for guided builds.
entries.technical_details: AI-powered with Novice Guard Mode, Smart Code Search, Live Preview. Includes Agent Planner. Galaxy suite: DRE Code, DRE Companion (Architect), NWA, Debugger, Replicated, DRE Architect (real-time novice preview).

entries.name: NWA / Debugger
entries.purpose: Fix bugs and resolve code errors after building in DRE Code. NWA handles general fixes; Debugger handles specific code error resolution.
entries.description: NWA and the Debugger are the fix layer of the DRE Galaxy suite. After building in DRE Code, if something breaks, you bring it here. NWA is the general repair tool. Debugger is for specific code errors. Both are part of the Galaxy suite alongside DRE Code, DRE Companion (Architect), and Replicated.
entries.best_for: Anyone who has built something in DRE Code and needs to fix or test it.
entries.workflow_position: Step 5 — Fix and test after building in DRE Code.
entries.technical_details: Part of the DRE Galaxy suite. Works in conjunction with DRE Code output.

entries.name: DRE Console
entries.purpose: GTM (Go-To-Market) command and execution center. Step-by-step execution blocks, plan cards with checklists, tool sidebar, AI panel, and progress tracking.
entries.description: DRE Console is your GTM tool — it runs execution plans built in DRE Workflow. It does NOT scale on its own. Use it as part of the flow: Design in DRE Workflow, then execute here. The gold spaceship orbiting the core in the galaxy is DRE Console.
entries.best_for: Executing GTM workflows built in DRE Workflow. Not a standalone starting point.
entries.workflow_position: Execution Layer — runs after DRE Workflow designs. GTM-focused.
entries.technical_details: Multi-panel system: sidebar / workspace / AI panel. Orbits the CORE node as a gold spaceship.
entries.api_requirements: AI panel requires provider key for live assistance.

entries.name: Chat with DRE
entries.purpose: The website AI assistant that helps customers learn about the ecosystem, understand what we do as an organization, and helps businesses and operators reduce funding overhead.
entries.description: Chat with DRE is the public-facing AI assistant for the Galaxy-DRE website. It is NOT the same as DRE CS Interface (which is the operator planning tool). Chat with DRE helps customers navigate the ecosystem, learn about the tools, and understand how DRE can help their business or operation. It is powered by Andre Cloud — no API key required.
entries.best_for: New visitors, customers, and business operators learning about the ecosystem for the first time.
entries.workflow_position: Customer entry point — not part of the operator build flow.
entries.technical_details: Powered by Andre Cloud. No API key required. Access via the purple planet in the galaxy or the CHAT WITH DRE button in the Control Deck.
entries.privacy_notes: Conversations handled by Andre Cloud provider.

entries.name: Orbit
entries.purpose: The social layer of the Galaxy-DRE ecosystem. Community updates, collaborator connections, and live ecosystem progress.
entries.description: Orbit is where the ecosystem meets the world. Community hub, live progress, collaborator network, and ecosystem news — all in one place.
entries.best_for: Staying connected with the DRE community, following ecosystem updates, and finding collaborators.
entries.workflow_position: Social perimeter — connects the ecosystem to the outside world.
entries.technical_details: Self-contained social platform. Deployed as orbit.html.

entries.name: ZIP Tool
entries.purpose: Browser-native ZIP archiver and extractor. Zero server dependency.
entries.description: Drop files to compress. Drop a ZIP to extract. Zero server dependency, zero file upload, zero accounts.
entries.best_for: Anyone who needs to archive or extract files without trusting a third-party upload service.
entries.technical_details: Uses JSZip browser library. All processing client-side.
entries.privacy_notes: 100% local. Files never leave your device.

entries.name: DRE Extractor
entries.purpose: On-device audio extraction from any video or audio file. Outputs clean WAV. Zero server dependency.
entries.description: Drop any media file and DRE Extractor pulls the audio track and outputs a clean WAV. No uploads. No accounts.
entries.best_for: Content creators, podcasters, and researchers who need audio without cloud uploads.
entries.technical_details: Uses Web Audio API and browser-native decoding. Client-side only.

entries.name: DRE OS
entries.purpose: Browser and network exposure scanner. Scores your digital footprint and provides step-by-step hardening instructions.
entries.description: DRE OS scans browser signals, network metadata, and device fingerprinting vectors — then gives you a real exposure score with prioritized steps to reduce it.
entries.best_for: Anyone concerned about device tracking, digital privacy, or browser fingerprinting.
entries.workflow_position: Privacy layer — run periodically as a health check.
entries.technical_details: Reads navigator, screen, canvas, WebGL, and network signals locally. No server calls.
entries.privacy_notes: Reads local signals only. Nothing is transmitted.

entries.name: RePrizal AI
entries.purpose: LLM-powered resume builder with PDF import, AI reformatting pipeline, and polished export.
entries.description: Import your existing PDF resume. An LLM pipeline converts it to structured JSON. The builder renders a polished resume ready to export — without a monthly subscription.
entries.best_for: Job seekers who want AI-quality resume formatting without paying for a SaaS subscription.
entries.technical_details: PDF import via browser-native reader. AI JSON conversion via provider API.
entries.api_requirements: Requires API key (OpenAI or Anthropic recommended).
entries.privacy_notes: Resume data stays local. API key stored in browser only.

entries.name: DRE Flow
entries.purpose: AI-powered manuscript analysis dashboard. Chapter summaries, character arc checking, timeline consistency, highlight analysis.
entries.description: DRE Flow is built for authors managing complex manuscripts. Upload your .docx or .txt and DRE Flow runs AI-driven chapter analysis, character thread mapping, and consistency checks.
entries.best_for: Fiction and non-fiction authors managing complex narratives or multi-timeline stories.
entries.workflow_position: Creative layer — connects to Kleara Studios universe.
entries.technical_details: Supports Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, and DeepSeek. File processing client-side.
entries.api_requirements: Requires API key from Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, or DeepSeek.
entries.privacy_notes: Manuscript stays local. API key stored in browser only.

entries.name: Loan Shark
entries.purpose: Payday loan survival calculator. Maps exact reborrow sequences and exit strategies with cash flow timeline.
entries.description: Loan Shark calculates the exact sequence of payments and reborrows needed to survive your next payday — and the paydays after that. It maps danger zones and identifies exit windows.
entries.best_for: Anyone trapped in the payday loan cycle who needs a structured way out.
entries.technical_details: Pure calculation engine. Input income, bills, and active loans.

entries.name: 24 Hours
entries.purpose: Christ-centered daily rhythm app. Habits, bilateral focus sessions, urge resistance tracking, AI life coach, and evening reflection.
entries.description: 24 Hours is built for people who want structure, accountability, and a coach rooted in truth — not algorithms.
entries.best_for: Anyone building daily structure, fighting bad habits, or wanting a Christ-centered productivity system.
entries.technical_details: AI Coach supports OpenAI, Groq, DeepSeek, Anthropic. All data stored locally.
entries.api_requirements: AI Coach requires API key (OpenAI, Groq, DeepSeek, or Anthropic).
entries.privacy_notes: All data local. No tracking. No accounts.

entries.name: Kleara Studios
entries.category: Author Universe · DL Ford & Atlas Parks
entries.purpose: Literary arm of the ecosystem. Two authors, two perspectives on the same world. Completely separate creative universe.
entries.description:
DL Ford — Light / Exposure. People don't break. They decide. The DEFINED series.

Atlas Parks — Dark / Pattern. The dark doesn't hide things. It reveals what light ignores. HADDER: Isabella Hadder.

This is not a tool. This is the work.
entries.best_for: Readers interested in the DRE extended creative universe.
entries.workflow_position: Creative perimeter — separate from the tool ecosystem.
entries.technical_details: Rendered as a deep-space station node below the main galaxy.

sections.label: AI PROVIDERS
sections.title: AI PROVIDERS
sections.subtitle: All supported AI systems, their capabilities, and your responsibilities as the key holder.

providers.name: Andre Cloud
providers.desc: Built-in AI provider managed by the Andre ecosystem. Powers Chat with DRE and Andre Go premium features. No API key required — included with Andre Go premium.

providers.name: OpenAI
providers.desc: GPT-4o, GPT-4, and o-series models. Industry standard. Supported in DRE CS Interface, DRE Flow, RePrizal AI, and 24 Hours. Get your key at platform.openai.com.

providers.name: Anthropic Claude
providers.desc: Claude 3.5 Sonnet, Haiku, and Opus. Best for nuanced reasoning, long document analysis, and writing. Supported in DRE CS Interface, DRE Flow, and 24 Hours. Get your key at console.anthropic.com.

providers.name: Google Gemini
providers.desc: Gemini 1.5 Pro and Flash. Strong multimodal capabilities and speed. Supported in DRE CS Interface and 24 Hours. Get your key at aistudio.google.com.

providers.name: DeepSeek
providers.desc: Cost-effective alternative with strong coding and reasoning performance. Supported across DRE CS Interface and 24 Hours. Get your key at platform.deepseek.com.

providers.name: Groq
providers.desc: Ultra-fast inference via Groq LPU hardware. Used in 24 Hours for rapid AI coaching responses where speed matters. Get your key at console.groq.com.

providers.name: Local / LM Studio
providers.desc: Run models entirely on your own machine via LM Studio or any OpenAI-compatible local endpoint. Zero data leaves your device. Supported in DRE CS Interface via custom endpoint setting.

sections.label: WORKFLOW MAPS
sections.title: WORKFLOW MAPS
sections.subtitle: Execution paths for the Galaxy-DRE ecosystem. Each flow reflects how the tools connect for a specific goal.

flows.name: CORE EXECUTION LOOP
flows.desc: The base execution stack for any build project. Save Andre Go first (privacy foundation). Plan in DRE CS Interface. Design in DRE Workflow. Build in DRE Code with Agent Planner. Fix in NWA or Debugger. Depending on the project, this workflow can change — but this is the standard starting path.

flows.name: GTM EXECUTION
flows.desc: For Go-To-Market execution. Plan in DRE CS Interface, design the GTM flow in DRE Workflow, then run execution blocks step by step in DRE Console. Note: DRE Console does not scale on its own — always pair with a workflow.

flows.name: DAILY SYSTEM
flows.desc: Start your morning rhythm in 24 Hours. Bring any project blockers or daily planning to DRE CS Interface. Design your day's execution plan in DRE Workflow. Run it in DRE Console if GTM-focused.

flows.name: PRIVACY AUDIT
flows.desc: Start with Andre Go for device and browser security setup. Run full device exposure scan in DRE OS. Archive reports securely with ZIP Tool.

flows.name: MANUSCRIPT PIPELINE
flows.desc: Analyze manuscript structure in DRE Flow. Use DRE CS Interface for deep structural planning and revision direction. Publish and promote via Kleara Studios author platform.

flows.name: CAREER TRACK
flows.desc: Build and polish resume in RePrizal AI. Get application strategy and positioning from Chat with DRE. Track daily outreach and application habits in 24 Hours.

flows.name: FINANCIAL ESCAPE
flows.desc: Map your exact loan survival path in Loan Shark. Get strategic financial planning from Chat with DRE. Build a structured escape execution plan in DRE Workflow.

sections.label: ARCHITECTURE
sections.title: ARCHITECTURE
sections.subtitle: Engineering intelligence. System structure, protocols, and technical design decisions.

entries.title: SINGLE-FILE ARCHITECTURE
entries.body: Each tool in the ecosystem is a self-contained HTML file. No build system. No framework. No server required for local deployment. Deploy by dropping files in a directory. Maximum portability and zero dependency drift.

entries.title: LOCAL-FIRST DATA PROTOCOL
entries.body: All user data — sessions, API keys, conversation history, tool state — lives in browser localStorage or IndexedDB. No backend. No accounts required. No tracking by default. The user owns their data completely.
